title: Pack Saddle
summary: The Pack Saddle (German: Packsattel, 1,169 metres [3,835 ft]) is a high mountain pass in the Austrian Alps between the Lavant River valley in Carinthia and the Bundesland of Styria. It connects Pack & Preitenegg.
text: The Pack Saddle (German: Packsattel, 1,169 metres [3,835 ft]) is a high mountain pass in the Austrian Alps between the Lavant River valley in Carinthia and the Bundesland of Styria. It connects Pack & Preitenegg.
